expected_properties: Result reflects successive additions without intermediate reset.
o_en toggles appropriately for each operation.
additional_cases.goal: Validate back-to-back addition operations under unknown pipeline latency.
notes: Uses two distinct operand pairs with minimal idle cycles.
preconditions: Reset has been released and module is stable.
stimulus_intent: Drive two consecutive legal addition operations with minimal spacing.

stimulus_program.text: Observe stable outputs after second operation

timing_assumptions: Conservative observation; no fixed-cycle latency assumed.

expected_properties: When i_en is asserted, result equals adda + addb and o_en becomes 1 after a conservative latency.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Apply a single legal addition and verify correct sum and enable signaling.
notes: Uses a small non‑zero operand pair to avoid trivial zero‑sum edge effects.
baseline_case_enrichments.settle_requirement: Result and o_en must be stable for at least two consecutive clock cycles after o_en asserts.
stimulus_intent: Drive a representative legal input pattern across known non‑control inputs.

stimulus_program.text: Allow pipeline to produce stable result

timing_assumptions: Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.

expected_properties: Result correctly reflects addition at numeric extremes, including carry‑out into the 65‑bit result.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Exercise boundary‑value addition patterns on the adder inputs.
notes: Covers zero, maximum unsigned value, and one‑off cases.
baseline_case_enrichments.settle_requirement: Result and o_en must remain stable for at least two cycles after each operation.
stimulus_intent: Apply zero, maximum, and one‑off operand vectors.
timing_assumptions: Conservative observation; no fixed latency assumed.
